items.line_en: Good morning, Mr. Johnson.

items.line_en: the worst pain imaginable?

coach.hint: Chunk it: A four is manageable, / but I'll make sure to review your pain medications.

items.line_en: Have you taken your pain medication this morning?

coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you taken your pain medication this morning?

coach.hint: Chunk it: Great.

items.line_en: Have you experienced any nausea or vomiting since the surgery?

coach.say: Have you experienced any nausea or vomiting since the surgery?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you experienced any nausea or / vomiting since the surgery?

coach.hint: Chunk it: That's a good sign.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Sometimes anesthesia can cause nausea, / but it usually goes away within 24 hours.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you been able to eat or / drink anything?

coach.hint: Chunk it: I've been walking to the bathroom and back, / but I feel a little weak.

items.line_en: That's perfectly fine.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you feel any dizziness when / you stand up?

coach.hint: Chunk it: A little, / but it goes away after a few seconds.
